response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified the on-screen text '不安定な神様' (Fuan tei na Kamisama) as the song title.
2. Identified the guest performer as Suara, who is the original artist for many Utawarerumono songs.
3. Simplified the search query to '"不安定な神様" Suara Japanese and English lyrics'.
4. Confirmed the lyrics and English translation through the search results.
5. Mapped the scenes: Performance (00:00 - 01:53) and Conversation (01:53 - end).
response.global_summary: A live performance of the song "Fuan tei na Kamisama" by virtual performer Hakui Koyori and guest performer Suara, followed by a post-performance conversation between them.

scenes.description: Virtual characters Hakui Koyori and guest Suara perform the song 'Fuan tei na Kamisama' on stage, with the song title '不安定な神様' visible in the bottom-left corner.
scenes.song_title: Fuan tei na Kamisama (不安定な神様)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
不安定な神様
繰り返す出会いと別れ
また会えるその日まで
時かける旅人

あなたが泣いている
流るる涙の雨
泣くなとは言わない
心かなしくて

生きとし生けるもの
何かを背負いながら
見えない鎖につながれている
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Unstable God
Repeating encounters and partings
Until that day when we can meet again
Traveler crossing time

You are crying
Falling rain of tears
I won't tell you not to cry
My heart is sad

Living things
While carrying something on their backs
Are chained by invisible chains

scenes.description: The musical performance ends, and the performers engage in a conversation.
